commit_scope: Teach the Rust kernel-router to select BML path-template routes and make front-door catalog changes trigger deployment.

observations: Public pre-fix probes returned HTTP 200 without X-Form-Router for the promoted BML endpoints, while /api/utils/kernel_status returned X-Form-Router: native-kernel.
Rust route selection now gives exact matches pressure 0, path-template matches pressure 10, wildcard matches pressure 25, and rejects nonmatching template segment counts.

The source-compiled deploy/front-door/api.bml catalog now selects runtime-events-index, views-stats, reaction-concept-summary, reaction-concept-threads, concept-voices, and household-request-detail routes in Rust when Accept is present.
Hostinger and public deploy workflows now include deploy/front-door/**, and the deploy path test proves Dockerfile.kernel-router carries deploy/front-door/api.bml into /routes/api.bml.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; CI, merge, deploy, and public promoted-route header verification remain for this branch.

evidence_refs: public curl header probes against https://api.coherencycoin.com before the fix

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Promoted BML read routes with path-template patterns are selected by the production Rust kernel-router instead of falling through to Python without native route headers.
test_flows: After deploy, request promoted endpoints with Accept: application/json and verify X-Form-Router is native-kernel.
Run public deploy verification against api.coherencycoin.com and coherencycoin.com.
Confirm deploy/front-door/** changes trigger Hostinger Auto Deploy and Public Deploy Contract workflows.
